𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗗𝗢𝗪𝗕𝗥𝗢𝗞𝗘𝗥 | To provide a unified, real-time geospatial intelligence platform for monitoring global activities across various domains, including aviation, maritime, space, and geopolitical events.  🌟 Rising Fast!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified, real-time geospatial intelligence platform for monitoring global activities across various domains, including aviation, maritime, space, and geopolitical events.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time multi-domain OSINT dashboard
✅ Unified dark-ops map interface
✅ Tracks aircraft, ships, satellites, earthquakes, conflict zones, CCTV networks, GPS jamming, and geopolitical events
✅ Live data aggregation from dozens of open-source intelligence feeds
✅ Built with Next.js, MapLibre GL, FastAPI, and Python
✅ Detailed aviation tracking (commercial, private, military)
✅ Comprehensive maritime tracking (AIS, carrier strike groups)
✅ Orbital tracking of satellites with mission-type classification
✅ Geopolitical incident aggregation and conflict zone monitoring
✅ SIGINT/RISINT news feed aggregation


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 214 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ShadowBroker is a real-time, multi-domain OSINT dashboard that aggregates live data from dozens of open-source intelligence feeds and displays them on a unified map interface. It tracks aircraft, ships, satellites, earthquakes, conflict zones, CCTV networks, and geopolitical events, updating all information in real time.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗖𝗢𝗦𝗠𝗢𝗦-𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗩𝗘𝗥 | Securing and simplifying the management of self-hosted applications on a home server.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securing and simplifying the management of self-hosted applications on a home server.
📅 Created: Feb 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ App Store for easy installation and management
✅ Storage Manager with Parity Disks and MergerFS
✅ Network Storages based on RClone
✅ Reverse-Proxy with automatic HTTPS
✅ Authentication Server with MFA and multiple strategies
✅ Customizable Homepage
✅ Container Manager with Docker-compose support
✅ VPN for secure remote access
✅ Backups for applications


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 212 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 150 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Cosmos is a self-hosted home server solution designed to enhance the security and ease of managing personal applications. It acts as a secure gateway and server manager, offering features like an app store, storage management, reverse proxy, and authentication server to protect self-hosted services.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/azukaar/Cosmos-Server

✅ Configurable hex viewer/editor
✅ Basic hex editing (edit/delete/insert bytes)
✅ Select and copy/paste bytes
✅ Installation via cargo, AUR, and Homebrew
✅ Customizable themes and character sets

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Hexhog is a configurable hex viewer and editor written in Rust. It allows users to inspect and modify the byte-level content of files directly, offering basic editing features like byte insertion, deletion, copying, and pasting.

𝗣𝗟𝗨𝗚𝗘𝗧 | Automating the process of updating plugins and server software for Minecraft servers to save time and ensure all components are up-to-date.  📈 Growing!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating the process of updating plugins and server software for Minecraft servers to save time and ensure all components are up-to-date.
📅 Created: Feb 2021 • Updated: Feb 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automated plugin and server software updates
✅ Local and remote server management (SFTP/FTP)
✅ Support for Spigot, Modrinth, and GitHub plugin sources
✅ Updates for PaperMC, Purpur, Waterfall, and Velocity server software
✅ Console-based operation with command line arguments
✅ Python-based


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 187 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 30 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 13 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

pluGET is a Python-based package manager designed to automate the updating of plugins and server software for Minecraft servers. It supports local and remote server management via SFTP/FTP, integrating with APIs from Spigot, Modrinth, and GitHub to simplify plugin and server software maintenance.

LibrePods aims to liberate Apple AirPods features from the Apple ecosystem, enabling users to access premium functionalities like noise control, ear detection, and battery status on non-Apple devices, primarily Android and Linux.
